rationale.fidelity: Faithfully keeps one common daily set, the eight-item limit, estimated probabilities and margins, visitor uncertainty, and explicit exclusions of rank and personalization.
rationale.managerial_framing: Names the daily actor, slot opportunity cost, choice-set mechanism, objective, counterconditions, and bounded research question.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: It avoids claiming novelty and explicitly says literature-relative novelty cannot be established.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Labels the limit as simplifying and identifies calibration, realized gains, and empirical importance as unsupported.
rationale.prose_clarity: Clear but noticeably overbuilt for the prompt because of mode/readiness/gate metadata and repeated mapping/boundary sections.
rationale.overall: Full-fidelity, evidence-aware framing; only its procedural verbosity prevents a top score.
